'''Dragon slugs''' were large, fire-breathing creatures who ate [[lumni-spice]], living on both [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]<ref name="ANB">"[[A New Beginning]]"</ref> and [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]].<ref name="Shadow Stalker">{{GalaxyCite|10|Shadow Stalker}}</ref>

The fungus that created the spice was the slug's favorite meal; this diet often made them grow to 20 meters and develop armor-like skin. They were able to maintain a steady diet of the Fungal spice through fermentation, indirectly farming the very food they would later eat.

==Appearances==
*''[[Episode I Adventures 3: The Fury of Darth Maul]]''
*''[[The Bounty Hunters: Aurra Sing]]''
*{{GalaxyCite|10|Shadow Stalker}}
*"[[A New Beginning]]" {{Reprint|A New Beginning}} {{1st}}
